title: xylocalyx recurvus
intro: Xylocalyx recurvus, also known as the African bushman's candle or yellow candle bush, is a shrub-like plant native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Xylocalyx recurvus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat wounds, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of Xylocalyx recurvus can be made into a decoction, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to extract its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
